description:
SketchUp Make 2017 is open with a residential building model loaded (`C:\Users\Docker\Documents\wrong_scale_building.skp`). Wait! The model appears to have been imported with the wrong units and is currently 10x too large. The 'Front Door' component (the brown rectangle on the front wall) should be exactly 2.1 meters high, but currently it is 21 meters high.

Your task:
1. Use the Tape Measure tool to measure the height of the Front Door, type '2.1m', and accept the prompt to resize the entire model to match real-world scale.
2. Once the model is properly scaled, select the South-facing roof surface (the roof face directly above the front door).
3. Use the Skelion plugin to place standard solar panels in Portrait orientation on the south roof.
4. Save the final model as `C:\Users\Docker\Documents\scaled_solar_design.skp`.
